skills.name: obsidian-read-note
skills.description: Reads a note from the Obsidian vault using the read_note MCP tool.

skills.name: obsidian-write-note
skills.description: Writes or overwrites a note in the Obsidian vault using write_note.

skills.name: obsidian-append-to-note
skills.description: Appends content to an existing note with append_to_note.

skills.name: obsidian-update-section
skills.description: Updates or creates a specific markdown heading section using update_section.

skills.name: obsidian-create-note-from-template
skills.description: Creates notes from predefined templates via create_note_from_template.

skills.name: obsidian-search-notes
skills.description: Searches notes by keyword with search_notes.

skills.name: obsidian-list-notes
skills.description: Lists markdown files recursively with list_notes.

skills.name: obsidian-get-note-links
skills.description: Returns incoming and outgoing links with get_note_links.

skills.name: obsidian-get-outgoing-links
skills.description: Extracts outgoing links from a note with get_outgoing_links.

skills.name: obsidian-get-graph-context
skills.description: Builds local graph context and semantic cluster using get_graph_context.

skills.name: obsidian-hybrid-search
skills.description: Combines keyword and semantic ranking via hybrid_search.

skills.name: obsidian-get-similar-notes
skills.description: Finds semantically similar notes from a source note using get_similar_notes.
